### Checklist
- [ ] I have read `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
- [ ] My change follows the repository's coding expectations.
- [ ] I ran the checks I could run locally and noted any gaps.
- [ ] I added or updated tests when behavior changed.
- [ ] I updated docs if user-facing behavior changed.
- [ ] I did not add secrets, private data, local logs, or machine-specific paths.
- [ ] I preserved derivative-work attribution files where required.
